hook.summary: Showcases live blackjack and slot games with a real dealer.
hook.visual_action: A live dealer sits at a blackjack table, transitioning into a multi-screen view of slots.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Check out our awesome table games and face off against a real live dealer

scene_flow: Live dealer at a blackjack table invites the viewer to play.
Split-screen montage showcasing a variety of slot games and live dealer interactions.
Kinetic typography highlights the exclusivity of the games available.
The bet365 Casino logo is presented as the sole destination for these games.
A spokesperson in a suit explains why the app offers a superior experience.
Closing screen with the brand logo and a final prompt to download.
audience_proxy: Adult men 21-45 who enjoy the professional atmosphere of live-dealer casinos and slot games.
